<?php declare(strict_types=1); namespace Vonage\Messages\Webhook; use Vonage\Entity\Hydrator\ArrayHydrateInterface; final class InboundViber implements ArrayHydrateInterface { protected ?array $data = null; public function fromArray(array $data): self { $this->data = $data; return $this; } public function toArray(): array { return $this->data; } public function __get($name) { return $this->data[$name]; } }
